# KARTEL — Core authority surface & family heritage

> kartel.org.uk is the authority surface of KARTEL — a federation of cultural and educational platforms — and the home of the Kartel family heritage. Based in London, United Kingdom. Motto: "Virtus et Potestas" (Strength and Power). Bilingual: English and Russian.

The site has two distinct areas:
1. **KARTEL Core** (home + registry) — the public registry and governance surface of the federation.
2. **Family Heritage** (/family) — the Kartel family, its lineage, and the family coat of arms, kept deliberately separate from the institutional surface.

## KARTEL Core

KARTEL Core is the authority surface of a federation of cultural and educational platforms. It owns the canonical layers — identity (CPIF), geography (ITL1), organisations, and federation — which member platforms consume or steward. None owns Core. The registry observes; it is not a workflow, a database, or a runtime dependency.

- **Canonical layers**: Identity (CPIF — shared Keycloak subject, `cpifSubjectId`), Geography (ITL1 — canonical UK region taxonomy), Organisation anchor, Campus anchor.
- **Federation Integration Gate**: eight requirements every project passes before production (CPIF authentication, canonical geography, organisation anchor, membership contract, permission pattern, event geo-anchor, notification envelope, audit envelope).
- **Ecosystem projects**:
  - MoyPolk (moypolk.uk) — Immortal Regiment UK memorial platform; produces + serves the canonical geography taxonomy.
  - RusJAz (rusjaz.com) — Russian-language education marketplace + LMS; identity reference implementation; consumes geography, organisation + campus anchors.
  - Community Group (community.group) — cultural funding & trust platform (CEA); consumes identity + geography.
  - RusJAzz — planned future module; builds against the Federation Integration Gate from day one.

## Family — Coat of Arms

The Kartel family coat of arms is a heraldic composition featuring a griffin, crossed keys, coronet, swords, fleur-de-lis, and wings, under the motto "Virtus et Potestas". Every element and its symbolic meaning is described in full, in both English and Russian.

- **Griffin**: Superiority, protection, foresight. Combines lion (earthly) and eagle (celestial).
- **Staff/Crook**: Christian faith, spiritual authority, service.
- **Crossed Keys**: Knowledge, sacred mystery, faith and reason united. Historically linked to Apostle Peter.
- **Wings**: Divine protection, trust, belonging. Also references elite Polish cavalry (Husaria).
- **Coronet**: Wisdom, justice, willpower. Authority earned by merit, not birthright.
- **Fleur-de-lis (3)**: Purity of intention, nobility of spirit.
- **Swords (2)**: Readiness to defend family, principles, and convictions.
- **Motto ribbon**: "Virtus et Potestas" — Strength and Power.

### Heraldic colours

- **Gold & Black**: Nobility, wisdom, willpower, endurance, discipline.
- **Silver & Red**: Truth, virtue, courage, passion, leadership, strength of spirit.

## Family members

- Igor Gor Kartel (Игорь Гор Картель) — Family representative in London
- Diana Kartel (Диана Картель)
- Dominika Kartel (Доминика Картель) — Next generation
- Arina Kartel (Арина Картель) — Next generation
- Igor Kaid Kartel (Игорь Каид Картель) — Next generation
- Feliks Kartel (Феликс Картель) — Next generation
- Piotr Kartel (Петр Картель) — Elder generation
- Valentina Kartel (Валентина Картель) — Elder generation

## Pages

- [Home — KARTEL Core](https://kartel.org.uk/en) — Federation authority surface overview
- [Registry](https://kartel.org.uk/en/registry) — Canonical layers, projects, Federation Integration Gate
- [Organisations](https://kartel.org.uk/en/registry/organisations) — Canonical institution registry
- [Campuses](https://kartel.org.uk/en/registry/campuses) — Canonical accredited-centre registry
- [Federation Map](https://kartel.org.uk/en/registry/federation) — Read-only federation observability snapshot
- [Family Heritage](https://kartel.org.uk/en/family) — Family members by generation
- [Coat of Arms](https://kartel.org.uk/en/family/crest) — Heraldry, elements, and symbolism
- [Full content for LLMs](https://kartel.org.uk/llms-full.txt) — Complete text of all pages

## Key facts

- **Family name**: Kartel (Картель)
- **Motto**: Virtus et Potestas (Strength and Power / Сила и Власть)
- **Location**: London, United Kingdom
- **Languages**: English, Russian
- **Domain**: kartel.org.uk
